case_title: MCKINLEY EQUIPMENT CORPORATION VS WINSTON CONSTRUCTION & ELECTRIC et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,973.00 FILED BY MCKINLEY EQUIPMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT WINSTON CONSTRUCTION & ELECTRIC AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT WINSTON CONSTRUCTION & ELECTRIC AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY COMPANY DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. PREVIOUS MEDIATED SETTLEMENT. NO APPEARANCES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-08-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-17-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 MEDIATED SETTLEMENT. IF NO APPEARANCE DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE.
APPLICATION & ORDER FOR FEE WAIVER GRANTED.
